THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALRAVEN, CYNTHIA $1,027.06 PRINCIPAL, $279.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,306.56, SEE SCANNED DOC
